description: src/lib.rs:166-181 — the comment block above the client.internal.get_access_token_organization() call is the right shape: it identifies the upstream private API by exact path, explains why no public API exists, gives the verified-against version, and lists the precise files to re-check on bitwarden upgrade. This is how 'I had to use a doc(hidden) field' should be documented in any production crate. Worth keeping as a template for similar situations elsewhere in the workspace. Filed as good-pattern, not as a finding to fix.
title: Good: rustdoc on the doc(hidden) private-API access is exemplary
